issue_summary: CloudSolrServer can now route updates locally and no longer relies on inter-node update forwarding. Allow CloudSolrServer and SolrCmdDistributor to use JavaBin. CloudSolrServer now uses multiple threads to send updates by default.
javadoc_before:
/**
 * SolrJ client class to communicate with SolrCloud.
 * Instances of this class communicate with Zookeeper to discover
 * Solr endpoints for SolrCloud collections, and then use the 
 * {@link LBHttpSolrServer} to issue requests.
 */
javadoc_after:
/**
 * SolrJ client class to communicate with SolrCloud.
 * Instances of this class communicate with Zookeeper to discover
 * Solr endpoints for SolrCloud collections, and then use the 
 * {@link LBHttpSolrServer} to issue requests.
 * 
 * This class assumes the id field for your documents is called
 * 'id' - if this is not the case, you must set the right name
 * with {@link #setIdField(String)}.
 */
